values.value: A marketing-qualified lead across multiple journeys, showing likelihood scores, engagement history, and BU membership.

A marketing-qualified lead who has opened 4 emails, clicked 2, and is enrolled in both a nurture journey and a webinar follow-up. Story: showcase real-time engagement, likelihood scores, and cross-BU orchestration.

{"persona":{"First_Name__c":"Alex","Last_Name__c":"Morgan","Title__c":"VP of Marketing","Company__c":"Northwind Retail","Customer_ID__c":"MK-99012","Segment__c":"MQL - High Engagement","Lifecycle_Stage__c":"Engaged NDR","LTV__c":180000,"Propensity__c":"High","Engagement_Score__c":89,"Engagement_Label__c":"Highly Engaged","Risk_Tier__c":"Low","Badge_Text__c":"Marketing Qualified","Suggested_Opener__c":"Hi Alex, I saw you registered for our upcoming webinar on omnichannel personalization — perfect timing given your recent visits to our journey builder pages. I would love to walk you through what a live implementation looks like for a retailer your size.","Intent_Summary__c":"Alex has engaged consistently over 30 days: 4 opens, 2 clicks, registered for an upcoming webinar. Enrolled in both a product nurture journey and a webinar follow-up sequence.","Key_Context__c":"MQL with clear buying signals. Two active journeys across Marketing and Sales BUs. Never unsubscribed. Consistent morning engagement pattern.","Open_Likelihood__c":94,"Click_Likelihood__c":81,"Unsubscribe_Risk__c":2},"insights":[{"Title__c":"Book a Discovery Call","Category__c":"Next-Best-Action","Why_This_Suggestion__c":"MQLs at engagement score 85+ have a 62% call-book rate when contacted within 24h of webinar registration.","CTA_Label__c":"Send Calendar","Sort_Order__c":1}],"activities":[{"Type__c":"Web","Title__c":"Registered for Webinar","Description__c":"Signed up for "Omnichannel Personalization at Scale" via marketing site.","Timestamp_Label__c":"1 hour ago","Icon__c":"utility:event","Sort_Order__c":1},{"Type__c":"Email","Title__c":"Clicked Product Update Email","Description__c":"Clicked the Journey Builder feature callout in this week's product update.","Timestamp_Label__c":"Yesterday","Icon__c":"utility:email","Sort_Order__c":2},{"Type__c":"Email","Title__c":"Opened Welcome Series #3","Description__c":"Opened the third email in the welcome nurture sequence.","Timestamp_Label__c":"3 days ago","Icon__c":"utility:email","Sort_Order__c":3}],"journeys":[{"Journey_Name__c":"Product Nurture — Journey Builder","Business_Unit__c":"Corporate Comms","Status__c":"Active"},{"Journey_Name__c":"Webinar Follow-up — Omnichannel","Business_Unit__c":"Corporate Comms","Status__c":"Active"}],"recipe":{"leftRail":[{"component":"demoUnifiedProfileHeader"}],"center":[{"component":"demoAgentforceBrief"}],"rightRail":[{"component":"demoLikelihoodScoreCard"},{"component":"demoActivityTimeline"},{"component":"demoActiveJourneyTracker"}]}}
